user_query: I've been stuck in meetings most of the week. Which days have nature activities where I can actually get outside?

node_data.name: Toronto Islands Ferry and Bike Ride
node_data.description: Ferry ride to Toronto Islands followed by bike rental and exploration. Outdoor nature activity with beaches, gardens, and stunning skyline views. Perfect for families and kids.

selected_nodes.reasoning: This node explicitly describes an outdoor nature activity involving a ferry ride, bike rental, beaches, and gardens, which directly answers the user's request to get outside.
